warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
10 toe walks
10 heel walks
Wrist Mobilisation
gymnastics:
HSPU Progression
EMOM x4 20-30 sec wall facing handstand hold
EMOM x 4 DB Z Press
EMOM x 2 - Find your Tripod
EMOM x 4 - 6-10 Box Pikes (High Hips)
EMOM x 4 - Pick one -
Box Pike
Tempo Box Pike
Strict HSPU
Deficit Strict HSPU
EMOM x 5 - Kipping drive against wall
- lay on the ground - explosive hips up to wall
EMOM x 4 Kipping HSPU
Chest to bar progression
EMOM x 4 10 Beat Swings (tight shapes)
EMOM x 3 10 Bigger  beat swings
EMOM x 3 Lean Back & Focus on Hip Pop
EMOM x 3 Singles - Pull in Push away
EMOM x 5 Jumping C2B - Pause at the Bar - maintain hollow ribs to hips - slow lower

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes vertical pressing, pulling, and anterior core; horizontal pulling and leg work provide active recovery without interference.

Workout | 8 min AMRAP
5 HSPU
10 V-ups
5 C2B
siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: HSPU Progression. Metcon: AMRAP 8 minutes: 5 HSPU, 10 V-ups, 5 C2B. For hypertrophy, focus on back (horizontal), legs (posterior chain), arms (biceps).
